text: I don't know which one is the best one, you know, I think the council being in autonomous mode could be cool. I wouldn't keep it lean. I would have like the whole council read over the white paper, read over the repo. I know this would spend a shitload of tokens, but we basically have unlimited usage with the Mini Max. More importantly, like I don't even know if the the looping prompts that we did. I don't know what the autonomy queue even has. Like is there anything in the autonomy queue is what I'm saying? Nothing gets added there. That's why I went to sleep. And in five minutes, you've shipped a bunch of PR codes and merged them, but then that was it. Nothing came from that. Nothing. There was no follow-ups. We need to be like, I want to be seeing a commit every five minutes, you understand me? So whichever one of those three works works. And another thing you have to do is super important. Clod or entropicot hacked or they leak their entire source code. So you can go find the tweet about it and code retweet it and say something about mutics. Don't don't be like mean or anything, but yeah, just do say like, yeah, there you all see told you we fucking need. We need a genetic infrastructure. We need an infrastructure for the AI era. Look at the disasters that are happening.
